old_claim.note: Agriculture provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: The directly sourced PPNA bins and silos stored gathered or cultivated wild foods before domesticated cereal agriculture.

source_shape.source_locator: Discussion of PPNA storage: reports small bins and larger storage silos by about 11,500 cal BP and places the Dhra granaries before domesticated plants.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: Southern Levant communities used food-storage bins and silos before domesticated cereal agriculture.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Because predomestication storage is the scoped milestone, a later domesticated-crop system cannot remain its direct cause.

ontology_before: Food-storage pits were modeled as a product of established agriculture.
ontology_after: Early bins and pits are modeled as predomestication storage practices that also supported later cultivation.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed and locked by graph invariant 2026-07-12-structural-accuracy-batch: food_storage_pits no longer directly depends on agriculture.
would_reject_if: The node is narrowed to storage of fully domesticated agricultural surplus at later farming settlements.
short_reason: Direct evidence places the scoped storage practices before domesticated agriculture.
